blockers: GKG CLI is missing from PATH and the GKG server is not reachable/indexed; GitNexus CLI and direct source inspection were used.
GitNexus detect_changes is unavailable in the installed CLI surface; gitnexus status and git diff checks were used.
Global git diff --check still fails on pre-existing dirty-tree whitespace outside this production-readiness slice; scoped check over touched files passed.
Production Ready cannot be claimed until release-owner waivers are approved for BF-07 lab creation depth, BF-09 pharmacy dispensing depth, and BF-11 external notification delivery.
summary: Completed HMS production-readiness hardening pass with synthetic release-demo data. Visual diffs were reviewed route-by-route, snapshots updated after acceptance, npm vulnerabilities remediated to zero, branch coverage raised to 80.08%, production ops smoke/backup-restore/privacy checks passed, and final backend/frontend/Docker/Playwright verification passed. Final report decision is Demo Ready Only pending release-owner waiver approval.
next_action: Release owner should approve or reject waivers W-01, W-02, and W-03 in docs/06-testing/full-hms-production-readiness-report-2026-05-22.md before any Production Ready claim.
